title: cephaelis iodotricha
intro: Cephaelis iodotricha, also known as Iodotrichetum, is a plant species in the Rubiaceae family, commonly found in the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cephaelis iodotricha include treating various infections, wounds, and skin conditions, as well as providing relief from fever and pain. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its roots are used to create herbal teas and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
